## Markets type

Zeitgeist Markets model. Query and create markets.

**Signature:**

```typescript

    } : {}>;

    getStage: C extends RpcContext<MS> ? (market: Market<Context<MS>, MS>, time?: ChainTime) => Promise<MarketStage> : never;
};
```
